cards.prompt: GetSourceLabel<T> switch по типу: int[] и List<char> — какие рукава?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; static int GetSourceLabel<T>(IEnumerable<T> source) => source switch { System.Array array => 1, ICollection<T> collection => 2, _ => 3 }; var numbers = new int[] { 10, 20, 30 }; var letters = new List<char> { 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd' }; System.Console.WriteLine(GetSourceLabel(numbers)); System.Console.WriteLine(GetSourceLabel(letters));

static decimal GetGroupTicketPrice(int visitorCount) => visitorCount switch { 1 => 12.0m, 2 => 20.0m, 3 => 27.0m, 4 => 32.0m, 0 => 0.0m, _ => throw new System.ArgumentException("bad") }; System.Console.WriteLine(GetGroupTicketPrice(3));

static string Classify(double measurement) => measurement switch { < -4.0 => "Too low", > 10.0 => "Too high", double.NaN => "Unknown", _ => "Acceptable" }; System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(13)); System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(double.NaN)); System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(2.4));
